_readme: The evolved multi-project registry (design doc §3.5) — known-mod-repos.json's
v2 successor. PROJECT-SESSION-WRITABLE (baton-exempt): onboarding a project
never requires the design master. No secrets, no machine paths (those live in
machine-local *.local sidecars mapping project_id -> clone path/creds).
Phase 3: this is the skeleton's canonical registry; the harness keeps its
legacy flat known-mod-repos.json until Phase 4 merges them. Readers already
